items.headline: India Hikes Windfall Tax on Diesel, ATF Exports Amidst Rising Global Oil Prices
items.summary: India has increased its windfall tax on diesel and ATF exports to ₹15.5 and ₹14.5 per litre, respectively, effective July 16, 2026, in response to surging global oil prices influenced by US-Iran tensions.

items.headline: Government Boosts Local Manufacturing to Reduce Import Dependence
items.summary: The Indian government is intensifying efforts to reduce import dependence in key sectors like electronics, chemicals, and semiconductors through potential subsidies and incentives, including a ₹1.9 trillion financial support for chip and smartphone production and a policy to boost local fertilizer production.

items.headline: India's Retail Inflation Breaches RBI Target at 4.38% in June
items.summary: India's retail inflation reached 4.38% in June 2026, exceeding the RBI's 4% target for the first time in 16 months. Economists hold differing views on immediate monetary policy changes, though the RBI recently maintained its repo rate at 5.25%.

items.headline: US Inflation Exceeds Expectations, Wall Street Rallies
items.summary: The US inflation report surprised markets, leading to a rally on Wall Street with the Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq Composite closing higher on Wednesday.

items.headline: Asian Markets Open Mixed to Negative, Nikkei and Kospi Decline
items.summary: Asian markets showed a mixed to negative opening, with Japan's Nikkei 225 dropping 3% and South Korea's Kospi slipping 5.8%. Futures for Hong Kong's Hang Seng index, however, indicated a higher opening.

items.headline: Crude Oil Prices Remain High on US-Iran Tensions
items.summary: Brent crude futures are trading above $85 per barrel, driven by ongoing US-Iran geopolitical tensions, maintaining concerns over global oil supply.

items.headline: Q1 FY27 Earnings Season Sees 40 Companies Report Today
items.summary: Approximately 40 companies are scheduled to release their Q1 FY27 earnings today, July 16, 2026, including Wipro, Jio Financial Services, Tech Mahindra, BHEL, ITC Hotels, Polycab, CEAT, South Indian Bank, and Newgen Software.

items.headline: HDFC Life Reports Strong Q1 FY27 Performance
items.summary: HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd reported a 12% YoY increase in New Business Premium to ₹8,143 crore, a 9% rise in Value of New Business (VNB) to ₹879 crore, and an 11.5% increase in net profit to ₹611 crore for Q1 FY27.

items.headline: Jana Small Finance Bank Posts 52% Profit Growth in Q1 FY27
items.summary: Jana Small Finance Bank Ltd announced a 52% increase in quarterly profit to ₹155 crore, with Net Interest Income rising 33.4% to ₹782 crore in Q1 FY27.

items.headline: ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Q1 FY27 Profit Up 28%
items.summary: ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company reported a 28% year-on-year increase in profit after tax (PAT) to Rs 3.86 billion for Q1 FY27.

items.headline: Groww's PAT Jumps 94.3% YoY in Q1 FY27
items.summary: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd (Groww) reported a significant 94.3% year-on-year increase in Profit After Tax (PAT) to Rs 7.35 billion for Q1 FY27.

items.headline: HDB Financial Services Reports 38.3% Rise in Net Profit
items.summary: HDB Financial Services saw its net profit rise by 38.3% to ₹785 crore.

items.headline: Himadri Specialty Chemical Net Profit Rises, Strong EBITDA Margin
items.summary: Himadri Specialty Chemical reported a rise in net profit to ₹228 crore, achieving an EBITDA margin of 20.11%.

items.headline: E-Commerce, Electric Equipment, Speciality Chemicals Sectors See Surge
items.summary: On July 15, the E-Commerce sector experienced the most significant surge in market capitalization, rising by 2.77%, followed by Electric Equipment and Speciality Chemicals stocks.

items.headline: Edible Fat Sector Sees Decline, Auto and Oil & Gas Witness Buying
items.summary: The Edible Fat sector stocks declined the most, falling 3.67% on Wednesday. Broader market sentiment showed buying in the auto and oil & gas sectors, while metal and realty sectors saw selling pressure.

items.headline: FIIs Net Sellers, DIIs Net Buyers on July 15
items.summary: Foreign Institutional Investors (FIIs) were net sellers of shares worth ₹735.83 crore on July 15, while Domestic Institutional Investors (DIIs) were net buyers of shares worth ₹704.93 crore.

items.headline: TVS Holdings Subsidiary to Acquire Varthana Finance for ₹967 Crore
items.summary: TVS Holdings' subsidiary, Home Credit India, is set to acquire 100% of Varthana Finance for ₹967 crore, pending RBI approval.

items.headline: Hero MotoCorp Increases Stake in Ather Energy with ₹960 Crore Investment
items.summary: Hero MotoCorp increased its stake in Ather Energy to 30.68% by investing ₹960 crore through the subscription of 76.19 lakh convertible warrants at ₹1,260 per warrant.

items.headline: Adani Power Signs 25-Year Power Supply Agreement with MSEDCL
items.summary: Adani Power Ltd has signed a 25-year Power Supply Agreement with Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Company (MSEDCL) for 1,600 MW from a new ultra-supercritical thermal power plant.

items.headline: Amara Raja Commissions 60 MWh Cathode Production Plant
items.summary: Amara Raja has commissioned a 60 MWh Cathode Production Plant (CQP) in Telangana with an investment of ₹500 crore, with commercial cell production expected next year.

items.headline: India Pesticides Fungicide Receives EU Technical Equivalence Approval
items.summary: India Pesticides announced that its fungicide has received EU Technical Equivalence approval, indicating its quality meets European standards.

items.headline: Brigade Enterprises Board Approves Warrants and NCDs
items.summary: Brigade Enterprises' board has approved 34.23 lakh warrants worth ₹180 crore and non-convertible debentures of up to ₹1,500 crore.

items.headline: Exide Industries Invests ₹100 Crore in Subsidiary Exide Energy Solutions
items.summary: Exide Industries has invested ₹100 crore in its wholly-owned subsidiary, Exide Energy Solutions, furthering its commitment to energy solutions.

items.headline: India Shelter Finance Board to Consider Raising ₹100 Crore via NCDs
items.summary: The board of India Shelter Finance is scheduled to meet on July 20, 2026, to consider raising up to ₹100 crore through non-convertible debentures.

items.headline: Spandana Sphoorty Financial Acquires Remaining Stake in Criss Financial
items.summary: Spandana Sphoorty Financial has acquired the remaining stake in Criss Financial, consolidating its ownership.

items.headline: Karnataka Bank Appoints Biji Sreekrishnavilas Sankaranarayanan as ED
items.summary: Karnataka Bank has appointed Biji Sreekrishnavilas Sankaranarayanan as Executive Director, effective July 15, 2026.

items.headline: Latent View Appoints Sonal Ramrakhiani as Chief Executive Officer
items.summary: Latent View has appointed Sonal Ramrakhiani as its new Chief Executive Officer, signaling a leadership change.

items.headline: NTPC Green Subsidiary Wins 50 MW Wind Project
items.summary: Ayana, a subsidiary of NTPC Green, has secured a 50 MW wind project, contributing to the parent company's renewable energy portfolio.

items.headline: Dividends Announced for GRPLTD, CRAMC, CRAFTSMAN, COROMANDEL, ASPINWALL
items.summary: GRPLTD (Rs 3.50/share), CRAMC (Rs 2.50/share), CRAFTSMAN (Rs 11.25/share), COROMANDEL (Rs 2/share), and ASPINWALL (Rs 6.50/share) have an ex-date of July 16, 2026, for their respective dividends.

items.headline: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Limited Trading Symbol Change
items.summary: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Limited's trading symbol will change to 'AEROPLANE' from July 20, 2026.

items.headline: Stocks in Focus Ahead of Q1 FY27 Earnings and Corporate Updates
items.summary: HDFC Life, Adani Power, TVS Holdings, Ather Energy, Jana Small Finance Bank, ICICI Prudential Life Insurance, Groww, Himadri Specialty Chemical, India Pesticides, Spandana Sphoorty Financial, Karnataka Bank, Latent View, NTPC are expected to be in focus due to recent Q1 results or corporate announcements.

items.headline: UltraTech Cement, SBI, Bajaj Finance Among Top Gainers
items.summary: UltraTech Cement, SBI, and Bajaj Finance were among the top gainers in Wednesday's trading session, indicating positive momentum.

items.headline: Kaynes Placed Under F&O Ban
items.summary: Kaynes is currently under the Futures & Options (F&O) ban, restricting new derivative positions.
